title: boehmeria platyphylla var. pilosiuscula
intro: Boehmeria platyphylla var. pilosiuscula, also known as the hairy nettle or Chinese nettle, is a plant species that belongs to the Urticaceae family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Boehmeria platyphylla var. pilosiuscula include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
